entities.name: SINAPIS ARVENSIS
entities.description: A plant species used to study the inheritance of seed dormancy

entities.name: SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: The physiological state where seeds prevent germination, analyzed for its inheritance patterns

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of breeding for dormant and non-dormant seed lines over multiple generations

entities.name: CROSSES
entities.description: The hybridization of dormant and non-dormant lines to identify genetic components of dormancy

entities.name: MATERNAL COMPONENT OF SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: The aspect of seed dormancy inheritance controlled by the maternal parent

entities.name: EMBRYONIC COMPONENT OF SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: The aspect of seed dormancy inheritance controlled by the embryo

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Genetic variants that control the expression of seed dormancy

entities.name: SINGLE LOCUS
entities.description: A specific genetic location that controls the maternal component of seed dormancy

entities.name: MODEL
entities.description: A theoretical framework constructed to test the number of alleles controlling dormancy
